LightningComponentBundle.description: This component shows the Invoices sorted on Invoice Date (newest first) and let's users pay their invoices via the Billecta Swish Api. All Text strings used are editable from Custom Labels.

property.name: person
property.label: User AccountId
property.description: Warning: Should always be {!User.AccountId}. Change this for debugging only

property.name: maxRows
property.label: Set Maximum Number of Rows
property.description: Setting a limit will ensure that only the e.g. 6 or 12 latest invoices will be displayed.
